title: Backtracking, Constraint Propagation, and Branch-and-Bound · Structure Brief: Branch Bound
summary: Search schedules and assignments while proving why pruned branches cannot help. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 branch bound increment in a bounded combinatorial solver with pruning audit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain incumbent solutions and optimistic bounds for optimization search.
Use constrained-first and value-order heuristics without confusing speed with correctness.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
